title: hakea miqueliana
intro: Hakea miqueliana, also known as the Philippine hakea, is a plant species in the family Proteaceae. It is a shrub or tree that is native to the Philippines, and is valued for its medicinal properties. Hakea miqueliana has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
